endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/documents:analyzeEntities
endpoints.description: Finds named entities (currently proper names and common nouns) in the text along with entity types, salience, mentions for each entity, and other properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/documents:analyzeSentiment
endpoints.description: Analyzes the sentiment of the provided text.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/documents:analyzeSyntax
endpoints.description: Analyzes the syntax of the text and provides sentence boundaries and tokenization along with part of speech tags, dependency trees, and other properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/documents:annotateText
endpoints.description: A convenience method that provides all the features that analyzeSentiment, analyzeEntities, and analyzeSyntax provide in one call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
